title: API Connector authentication
content: The API Connector supports configuring authentication and reusable calls. Private credentials should be treated as configuration and not copied into generated artifacts.
summary: API Connector calls need explicit authentication configuration and credentials must stay private.
license_note: Official Bubble manual excerpt cached for local developer assistance.

title: Privacy rules
content: Privacy rules control which data can be read by clients. Migration and documentation workflows should inspect privacy implications before changing data access.
summary: Privacy rules are part of data access design and migration risk review.
license_note: Official Bubble manual excerpt cached for local developer assistance.
